data.title: Microservices
data.description: Spotify employs a microservices architecture to allow independent deployment and scaling of features.
data.technical_spec: Services communicated via HTTP/REST and event streaming with Kafka.

data.title: Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: The backend is hosted on cloud platforms for scalability and resilience.
data.technical_spec: Primarily on Google Cloud Platform (GCP) with Kubernetes for container orchestration.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: CDN is used for efficient media file delivery to ensure low latency streaming.
data.technical_spec: Leveraging global CDN networks like Cloudflare or Akamai.

data.title: APIs and SDKs
data.description: APIs support third-party integrations and a wide ecosystem of apps and services.
data.technical_spec: RESTful API with OAuth 2.0 for authentication.

data.title: Data Analytics
data.description: Advanced analytics and big data frameworks for personalized user experience.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Apache Hadoop, Dataflow, and BigQuery.
